subcodes.first_line: O Javad! The desire in the heart of every discerning one is to increase in nearness to the Divine Threshold, and the aspiration of every person of learning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جواد من مراد فواد هر هوشمند ازدیاد تقرب درگاه کبریاست و آرزوی هر دانشمند
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for healing, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @nearness and remoteness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @attaining good pleasure of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
